---
name: 🚀 New Skill Submission
about: Suggest or submit a new agent skill to be audited and added to the leaderboard
title: '[SUBMIT] - <repository-name>'
labels: submission
assignees: ''
---

## 📦 Submission Overview

- **Source Repository Link:** (e.g. `https://github.com/owner/repository`)
- **Main Author/User Handle:** @username
- **Short Description:** What does this agent skill accomplish?

---

## 🔬 Estimated Audit Performance (If Known)

Have you tested this skill in the SkillGauge Sandbox or CLI? If so, paste the results:
- **Estimated Score:** 
- **Quality Tier:** (Tier 1 / Tier 2 / Tier 3)

---

## 📄 Skill Content Draft / Preview
(Optional: If your repository is not public yet, you can paste the markdown contents of your skill prompt here. Ensure it contains the frontmatter header block).

```markdown
---
name: your-skill-name
description: your description here
---

# Your Skill Guidelines...
```
